behaviors.description: Speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels for attendee attribution.
behaviors.justification: Failure depends on real STT model output fidelity (speaker diarization/label retention), so mocks/stubs can hide true failures (LLM-DEP + MOCK-HIDE). Rejected Workflow: behavior text targets STT label preservation itself, not validation of multiple model decisions across a full chain.
behaviors.test_description: Run real meeting audio with multiple speakers through the production STT API and assert transcript segments retain correct speaker labels required by downstream attribution fields.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: This is deterministic parsing/structuring logic on transcript text; real OS/network/model behavior is not required (MOCK-MISS says local function boundary). Rejected Integration: no concrete behavior text requiring multi-module handoff to expose the bug.
behaviors.test_description: Feed parser fixtures containing explicit assignment utterances and assert exact structured output fields for assignee and task text.

behaviors.description: Live summary includes at least one action item for every attendee assigned a task.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on LLM content selection/completeness over assigned attendees; deterministic stubs would always miss this failure mode (LLM-DEP + deterministic-assertion trap). Rejected Workflow: can be tested with a prepared transcript input to a single real summarization step without requiring multi-agentic chaining.
behaviors.test_description: Provide real transcript text with known attendee-task assignments to the production summarization model and assert each assigned attendee appears with >=1 action item in output.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction routes identified decisions into `decisions` schema fields, not generic narrative.
behaviors.justification: Failure is at module boundary: extracted decision objects must be handed to schema-mapping/output modules correctly (MOCK-MISS). Integration brake: no real OS/network/subprocess required; no dependence on model quality if identified decisions are provided as input; no multi-agentic chain.
behaviors.test_description: Wire decision-identification output fixture into routing/serialization modules and assert decisions populate `decisions[]` schema while narrative fields exclude them.

behaviors.description: Key decisions in transcript appear in live summary `decisions` section, not buried in narrative.
behaviors.justification: This checks model judgment and output placement quality from transcript content; stubbed outputs would hide real misclassification/placement failures (LLM-DEP + MOCK-HIDE). Rejected Workflow: behavior can be validated on real summarizer with transcript input, without requiring multiple agentic stages.
behaviors.test_description: Run real summarization on transcripts containing explicit decisions and assert those decisions are represented in `decisions` section and absent as only narrative mentions.

behaviors.description: For audio >60 minutes, service segments, processes sequentially, and merges into one coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires multiple sequential processing steps and merged final quality across segments. With real STT/LLM calls per segment, correctness depends on multiple agentic decisions and their handoff/merge (MULTI-STEP + LLM-DEP). Rejected Agentic: concrete behavior text requires sequenced segment pipeline plus merge, i.e., more than one agentic step.
behaviors.test_description: Use a real >60-minute recording, verify segment boundaries and sequential processing across segments, then assert merged final summary is structurally complete and cross-segment action items/decisions remain coherent.

behaviors.description: Full pipeline (upload, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes automatically for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: This is explicit end-to-end multi-stage pipeline execution with real recording and model-driven stages; failures can emerge only across chained steps and real infrastructure interactions (REAL-INFRA + MULTI-STEP + LLM-DEP). Rejected System: System captures infra/API boundaries but not the required multi-agentic pipeline correctness across stages.
behaviors.test_description: Execute production-like end-to-end run on a real meeting audio file: upload, STT, summarization, and delivery; assert completion without manual intervention and valid structured payload at the sink.
